author: y4rr
content: Audit-Fix Phase 4 APPROVE-WITH-FOLLOW-UPS. 8 BROKEN tests (#1050-#1057) strengthened heterogeneously: typed-fn-pointer signature pins (#1050/#1051/#1052/#1053/#1054), explicit error-variant accept-list (#1056), real Device::Display invocation replacing literal-vs-literal (#1055), strict-superset rename + doc-clarity (#1057). Sabotage probe (xpu_add → xpu_add_TYPO) caught via E0425. Follow-up #1076 filed for the src/ change (pub(crate) fn XpuDevice::new_for_testing) that would unblock runtime stub-mode verification — cited inline in #1053 and #1055 cascade_skip messages. No src/ changes, no new workspace deps.
